entries.title: README v1 10 1 general question layer
entries.summary: ArchE Learning Core v1.10.1 — General Question Layer This hotfix teaches ArchE not to answer every non-site question by dumping or summarizing random public site records. ## Repairs - Basic harmless math questions are answered directly before site retrieval fallback. - Simple square-root, arithmetic, and percent questions no longer get converted into mtthorne.com site summaries. - Public site questions still use appr…

entries.title: README v1 10 2 intelligence core
entries.summary: ArchE Backend v1.10.2 — Intelligence Core This package replaces the weak local fallback behavior with an OpenAI-first response layer and a broader deterministic fallback for simple public/general questions. ## Main repairs - Answers connection questions directly. - Handles simple arithmetic such as `550000x3`. - Handles square-root questions. - Handles obvious nonsense naturally instead of forcing site context. - Kee…

entries.title: README v1 10 3 common sense core
